stat_block.text: A polar travel kit costs 30 gp and is 4 Bulk. Each kit includes a bedroll, a climbing kit, a compass, a small knife, a repair kit, a short shovel, a short saw for cutting ice, a set of skis and poles, a pair of snow goggles, a pair of snowshoes, a spyglass, twenty tindertwigs, and two sets of winter clothing.
